User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the system, capable of acting as a hospital, engineer, or administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The unique email address of the user.

role.description: The assigned role of the user (e.g., hospital, engineer, admin).

status.description: The current status of the user's account.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

HospitalProfile.title: HospitalProfile
HospitalProfile.description: Stores detailed profile information for a hospital user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HospitalProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this hospital profile. (Relationship: User 1:N HospitalProfile)

hospitalName.description: The official name of the hospital.

address.description: The physical address of the hospital.

city.description: The city where the hospital is located.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the hospital.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the hospital's profile picture.

commercialRegistrationFileUrl.description: URL to the commercial registration file of the hospital.

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the hospital profile was verified.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the hospital profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the hospital profile was last updated.

EngineerProfile.title: EngineerProfile
EngineerProfile.description: Stores detailed profile information for an engineer user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EngineerProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this engineer profile. (Relationship: User 1:N EngineerProfile)

fullName.description: The full name of the engineer.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the engineer.

specialization.description: The primary specialization of the engineer.

yearsExperience.description: The number of years of experience the engineer has.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the engineer's profile picture.

certificationFileUrl.description: URL to the engineer's certification file.

nationalIdFileUrl.description: URL to the engineer's national ID file.

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the engineer profile was verified.

rating.description: The average rating received by the engineer.

totalJobs.description: The total number of jobs completed by the engineer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the engineer profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the engineer profile was last updated.

Device.title: Device
Device.description: Represents a medical device registered by a hospital for maintenance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Device entity.

hospitalId.description: Reference to the HospitalProfile that owns this device. (Relationship: HospitalProfile 1:N Device)

deviceName.description: The name of the medical device.

model.description: The model number of the device.

serialNumber.description: The unique serial number of the device.

lastMaintenanceDate.description: The date of the last maintenance performed on the device.

status.description: The current operational status of the device.

specialization.description: The medical specialization category of the device.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the device was registered.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the device information was last updated.

MaintenanceRequest.title: MaintenanceRequest
MaintenanceRequest.description: Represents a request for maintenance initiated by a hospital for a specific device.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaintenanceRequest entity.

hospitalId.description: Reference to the HospitalProfile that created this request. (Relationship: HospitalProfile 1:N MaintenanceRequest)

deviceId.description: Reference to the Device for which maintenance is requested. (Relationship: Device 1:N MaintenanceRequest)

title.description: A brief title summarizing the maintenance issue.

description.description: A detailed description of the maintenance problem, possibly augmented by an AI tool.

urgency.description: The urgency level of the maintenance request (e.g., critical, high, medium, low).

status.description: The current status of the maintenance request (e.g., open, assigned, in_progress, completed, cancelled).

assignedEngineerId.description: Reference to the EngineerProfile assigned to this request, if any. (Relationship: EngineerProfile 1:N MaintenanceRequest)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the maintenance request was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the maintenance request was last updated.

Bid.title: Bid
Bid.description: Represents an offer submitted by an engineer for a maintenance request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bid entity.

requestId.description: Reference to the MaintenanceRequest this bid is for.

engineerId.description: Reference to the EngineerProfile who submitted the bid.

hospitalId.description: Reference to the HospitalProfile who owns the parent request (denormalized for security).

price.description: The quoted price for the maintenance service.

estimatedDays.description: The estimated number of days to complete the maintenance.

description.description: Additional details or conditions provided by the engineer in the bid.

status.description: The current status of the bid (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected, withdrawn).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the bid was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the bid was last updated.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification sent to a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who is the recipient of the notification. (Relationship: User 1:N Notification)

message.description: The content of the notification message.

type.description: The type or category of the notification (e.g., general, urgent, bid_update).

isRead.description: Indicates whether the user has read the notification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a review and rating provided by a hospital for an engineer after a completed maintenance request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

requestId.description: Reference to the MaintenanceRequest this review is associated with. (Relationship: MaintenanceRequest 1:N Review)

hospitalId.description: Reference to the HospitalProfile that submitted the review. (Relationship: HospitalProfile 1:N Review)

engineerId.description: Reference to the EngineerProfile being reviewed. (Relationship: EngineerProfile 1:N Review)

rating.description: The rating given to the engineer (1-5 stars).

comment.description: Optional comment or feedback provided with the rating.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was created.

definition.description: Stores core user information including email and role.
Dedicated collection for Database Access Control.
Stores detailed profile for hospital users.
Stores detailed profile for engineer users.
Stores medical devices registered by hospitals.
Stores notifications specific to a user.
Stores reviews and ratings provided by hospitals for engineers.
